This species is classified within the phylum Marchantiophyta, which includes all liverworts. The phylum Marchantiophyta is further divided into three classes: Marchantiopsida, Jungermanniopsida, and Treubiopsida. Aneuraceae is a family within the class Jungermanniopsida, which includes many species of liverworts. This classification provides a framework for understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the Apochaete auronitens species.
